settings.heading: Detailed full-color apparel production for bold customer artwork.
settings.lead: DTF is one of the internal production methods L F Graphco can use when a custom apparel project needs detailed color, gradients or smaller-run flexibility.
settings.body:
Full-color production is part of the custom apparel toolkit L F Graphco uses to help schools, teams, businesses, churches and events get the right finished product.

Use this path for detailed shirt designs, short runs, customer artwork, event graphics, sponsor-heavy layouts and apparel campaigns where color flexibility matters.
settings.features: Full-Color Artwork,Detailed Graphics,Short Runs,Sponsor Logos,Customer Apparel

settings.heading: Detailed apparel examples from uploaded photos.
settings.intro: These photos show full-color output and production proof; they are used for DTF marketing without claiming a DTF machine is pictured.

settings.heading: Full-color print examples starting at $2.50.
settings.intro: These are production-method examples for custom apparel projects. Upload your artwork for review before final pricing.

settings.heading: Full-color production supports detailed custom apparel.
settings.intro: Pair detailed artwork with screen printing, embroidery or promotional products when the project needs more than one decoration path.
